question: What are the admission dates
answer: Admissions are open from 1st June to 31st July every year

question: How can I apply for admission
answer: You can apply online through the official admission portal

question: What are the documents required for admission
answer: You need mark sheets ID proof photographs and transfer certificate

question: Does IILM have management quota seats
answer: Yes limited management quota seats are available contact the admission office for details

question: What is the admission process
answer: Fill the form submit documents appear for counseling and complete fee payment

question: What is the tuition fee
answer: The tuition fee is around 50000 rupees per semester

question: Is there any scholarship for meritorious students
answer: Yes merit based scholarships are available based on academic performance

question: Do I have to pay fees online or offline
answer: Both online and offline payment options are available at IILM

question: What is the hostel fee
answer: Hostel fee is approximately 70000 per year including mess charges

question: Is the fee refundable
answer: Refund policy follows UGC guidelines contact the accounts office

question: Where is the library located
answer: The library is located in Building A on the ground floor

question: What are the library timings
answer: The library is open from 9 AM to 8 PM on working days

question: How many books can I issue
answer: Students can issue up to 3 books at a time

question: Is there digital library access
answer: Yes digital journals and e books are available through the IILM portal

question: What are the library rules
answer: Maintain silence return books on time and carry your ID card

question: Where is the computer lab
answer: The computer lab is located in Block B first floor

question: How to access campus WiFi
answer: Register your device at the IT helpdesk using your student credentials

question: WiFi is not working what should I do
answer: Visit the IT helpdesk in Block B for support

question: How to reset my student portal password
answer: Click on forgot password option on the student portal and follow instructions

question: Does IILM provide laptops
answer: The college does not provide laptops but offers student discounts on select brands

question: How do I contact the placement cell
answer: Email placement@iilm.edu or visit Block C Room 12

question: What is the placement record
answer: Placement percentage varies by program but average ranges between 80 to 90 percent

question: Which companies visit for placements
answer: Top recruiters include Infosys Wipro TCS Deloitte and HCL

question: Is internship compulsory
answer: Yes internships are mandatory for most undergraduate programs

question: How to apply for internships
answer: Check the placement portal for available internships and apply directly

question: When are semester exams held
answer: Exams are typically held in December and May every year

question: Where to download exam timetable
answer: Timetables are available on the student portal under the exam section

question: Who is the exam controller
answer: The exam controller is Professor A Kumar

question: How do I apply for re evaluation
answer: Submit a re evaluation form at the exam office with applicable fees

question: How to get duplicate marksheet
answer: Apply at the exam office and pay a small processing fee

question: How to apply for hostel
answer: You can apply for hostel accommodation through the student portal

question: What are hostel rules
answer: Hostel residents must follow timing rules maintain discipline and attend roll calls

question: Is hostel mess compulsory
answer: Yes mess facility is included for hostel residents

question: Can I choose my roommate
answer: Roommate requests are considered depending on availability

question: Is laundry service available
answer: Yes laundry services are available inside the hostel premises

question: Is there medical help on campus
answer: Yes a medical room and a nurse are available in Building B

question: Is there a canteen on campus
answer: Yes the canteen is near the main gate and open from 8 AM to 7 PM

question: Where is the sports ground
answer: The sports ground is behind Block C

question: Which sports are available
answer: Football basketball badminton table tennis cricket and volleyball are available

question: Are there cultural events
answer: Yes the college hosts festivals and cultural competitions every semester

question: How to download my timetable
answer: Timetables are available on the student portal

question: How to register for courses
answer: Course registration happens through the student portal during registration week

question: What is the attendance requirement
answer: A minimum of 75 percent attendance is required to appear in exams

question: How to check attendance
answer: Attendance details are available on the student portal

question: What is the grading system
answer: IILM follows a credit based grading system with letter grades

question: What are office timings
answer: The administrative office is open from 9 AM to 5 PM

question: How can I contact the principal
answer: Email principal@iilm.edu or visit the admin office

question: Where is the admin block
answer: The admin block is next to the main entrance gate

answer: Submit a request form at the admin office processing takes 2 working days

answer: You can report any issue to the student helpdesk or email support@iilm.edu

answer: Yes buses operate across major routes of the city

answer: Apply at the transport office with your ID card

answer: You must arrange your own transport in such cases

answer: The pickup and drop point is near the main gate

answer: Yes parking is available for two wheelers with a valid ID

question: What is the dress code
answer: Students are expected to dress neatly and appropriately

question: Is ragging allowed
answer: Ragging is strictly prohibited with zero tolerance policy

question: How to file a complaint anonymously
answer: You can use the online grievance form on the college website

question: Where is lost and found
answer: Lost and found items are kept in the admin office

question: Can parents meet faculty
answer: Yes parents can meet faculty during visiting hours
